notes: v395 — NEW: you can now check at a glance whether the 🤖 auto-pilot has actually run today. Open 💼 Portfolio and tap the "🤖 Auto-pilot · $50k test" tab — a status line at the top now tells you plainly one of: "✅ Ran today ✓" (with how many shares it bought, or that it scanned and bought nothing because nothing met your rules — which is discipline, not a fault); or, if it hasn't run yet, exactly WHY it's waiting (today's signals still preparing, no data loaded yet, or a download running) plus the date of its last completed run. It also shows its most recent decision, including the reason nothing was bought on a quiet day. So two days with no buys is easy to understand: the bot IS running each day, your entry rules are just being selective. Every scan is still logged with its date in the 📜 decision diary (⚙ advanced). Practice money only. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to update.
